idea-plugin.name: YAML Viewer
idea-plugin.description:
Human-readable YAML viewer with tree/table hybrid rendering

Tired of scrolling through 500-line Kubernetes manifests, Helm charts, or CI configs? YAML Viewer adds a navigable, structured preview next to any .yaml / .yml file — think OpenAPI/Swagger UI, but for arbitrary YAML.

Features

  • Split editor — raw YAML on the left, rendered tree view on the right
  • Hybrid tree + table rendering — nested sections collapse; leaf groups render as compact key/value/type tables
  • Type badges — string, int, float, bool, null shown inline at a glance
  • Bidirectional sync — click a node in the tree to jump to the line in the editor, and vice versa
  • Search & filter — Cmd/Ctrl+F filters the tree by key or value; Escape clears
  • Breadcrumb navigation — see the full path to the selected node, click to jump to any ancestor
  • Invalid-YAML tolerant — keeps the last valid view while you edit, instead of going blank
  • Schema-agnostic — works with any YAML file; no special-casing for specific formats

Built on the IntelliJ Platform YAML PSI — no external parsers, no performance surprises.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • Split editor with hybrid tree/table viewer
  • Bidirectional sync between editor caret and tree selection
  • Search/filter with debounced query and keyboard shortcuts
  • Breadcrumb navigation bar
  • Graceful handling of invalid YAML during edits
